codeActions.title: Add missing import
codeActions.description: Automatically import a symbol that is used but not imported in the current file

codeActions.title: Convert to standalone component
codeActions.description: Convert an NgModule-based component to a standalone component with standalone: true and direct imports

codeActions.title: Add lifecycle hook
codeActions.description: Add a lifecycle hook (OnInit, OnDestroy, OnChanges, etc.) to the current component or directive class

codeActions.title: Extract to service
codeActions.description: Extract selected logic into a new injectable Angular service

codeActions.title: Add @Input property
codeActions.description: Add a new @Input() property to the component or directive

codeActions.title: Add @Output property
codeActions.description: Add a new @Output() EventEmitter property to the component or directive

codeActions.title: Convert @Input to signal input
codeActions.description: Convert a decorator-based @Input() property to the signal-based input() function

codeActions.title: Convert @Output to signal output
codeActions.description: Convert a decorator-based @Output() EventEmitter to the signal-based output() function

codeActions.title: Convert *ngIf to @if
codeActions.description: Convert legacy *ngIf structural directive to new built-in @if control flow syntax

codeActions.title: Convert *ngFor to @for
codeActions.description: Convert legacy *ngFor structural directive to new built-in @for control flow syntax with track

codeActions.title: Convert ngSwitch to @switch
codeActions.description: Convert legacy ngSwitch directive to new built-in @switch control flow syntax

codeActions.title: Add form validators
codeActions.description: Add Validators (required, email, minLength, etc.) to a FormControl or FormGroup field

codeActions.title: Import module
codeActions.description: Add a missing module or standalone component/directive/pipe to the imports array

codeActions.title: Organize imports
codeActions.description: Sort and clean up import statements, removing unused imports

codeActions.title: Fix all auto-fixable lint issues
codeActions.description: Apply all available automatic fixes for linting and type errors

codeActions.title: Generate trackBy function
codeActions.description: Generate a trackBy function for *ngFor or a track expression for @for
